name: Cockscombs (Danish Pastry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the almond paste, butter, and sugar well in a small bowl until smooth and well-blended. Set aside.
2. Roll pastry on floured surface to 2 20-inch x 15-inch rectangles. Trim edges evenly.
3. With a sharp knife, cut into 12 5-inch squares. Spoon filling onto center of each square, dividing evenly.
4. Spread filling slightly parallel to one edge; brush edges lightly with egg.
5. Fold opposite edges over and press edges together to seal. Make 4 or 5 slits in sealed edge.
6. Place on cookie sheet, curving pastries slightly to resemble a cocks comb.
7. Let rise in warm place until double in bulk, about 30 minutes.
8. Brush with egg; sprinkle generously with sugar.
9. Place in hot oven (400°F); lower heat immediately to 350°F.
10. Bake 20 minutes or until puffed and golden brown. Remove to wire rack and cool.
